BaselineBracket: same-data bestfit; rd-offset sensitivity; CMB-only; audit baseline
RhoPolicy: rho<=4; fixed rho and bounded grid must be reported separately
CovariancePolicy: same residual covariance for K2 and nulls
SupportiveCondition: K2 competitive on independent baseline without rho>4 and without kernel change
WeakeningCondition: K2 viable only on same-data baselines or worse than nulls on independent baseline
StrongNegativeCondition: requires rho>4; kernel change; covariance/target mismatch; baseline selected after scoring
NextAction: Implement readiness checker and only then add a K2 scoring script.
